articles.author: Ronny Reyes
articles.title: Iran sends out suspected ‘operational trigger’ to activate sleeper cells abroad after Khamenei’s death, US officials warn - New York Post
articles.description: Iran allegedly sent out “an operational trigger” to activate “sleeper assets” abroad after the war with America and Israel began, according to an encrypted message intercept…
articles.content:
Iran sent out a possible “operational trigger” to activate “sleeper assets” abroad after the war with America and Israel began, according to an encrypted message intercepted by the US.
The coded sig… [+2617 chars]

articles.author: Cheyanne M. Daniels
articles.title: Tennessee GOP Rep. Andy Ogles says Muslims ‘don’t belong’ in America - Politico
articles.description: The Tennessee Republican recently introduced legislation banning immigration from some Muslim-majority nations.
